title: Japanese-Style Roasted Peanut Ozoni
description: A traditional Japanese soup with a twist, featuring roasted peanuts and served as a light, comforting meal. Ozoni is typically served on New Year's Day to bring good luck.
instructions: In a large pot, combine kombu seaweed and 4 cups of Japanese green tea. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove kombu seaweed and add silken tofu, roasted peanuts, miso paste, soy sauce, and grated ginger to the pot.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Ladle into bowls and garnish with scallions.
